modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be no spelling errors and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: EndNote integration with Word is not functioning properly.

full_description_text: The user is experiencing issues with the Cite While You Write feature in EndNote. Despite having the latest version of Office 365 installed, EndNote does not appear in Microsoft Word, preventing the user from utilizing its functionalities. This problem is occurring on both MacOS and Windows environments with EndNote x8/x9.
short_description: EndNote integration with Word is not functioning properly.
